questions.question: Who are you?
questions.subtext: This shapes which resources we recommend.

options.label: I'm an athlete
options.description: I compete in sport and want to sharpen my mental game.

options.label: I'm a sports parent
options.description: I support a young athlete and want to be a better resource for them.

questions.question: What's your biggest challenge right now?
questions.subtext: Pick the one that resonates most.

options.label: Mindset & Emotions
options.description: Managing nerves, confidence, negative self-talk, or emotional reactions.

options.label: Relationships & Communication
options.description: Navigating team dynamics, coach relationships, or parent-athlete communication.

options.label: Building Mental Skills
options.description: Developing focus routines, pre-competition habits, or performance cues.

options.label: Mental-Physical Connection
options.description: Linking mindset to physical training, recovery, and readiness.

questions.question: What do you most want to develop?
questions.subtext: Choose what feels most important right now.

options.label: Confidence & Capability
options.description: Perform at my best under pressure and trust my training.

options.label: Process Over Results
options.description: Stay focused on improvement instead of obsessing over outcomes.

options.label: Ownership & Independence
options.description: Take charge of my own development and think for myself.

options.label: Connection & Support
options.description: Strengthen relationships and build a healthy support system.

questions.question: Where are you in your journey?
questions.subtext: Our curriculum is organized in progressive stages.

options.label: Building Self-Awareness
options.description: Understanding my patterns, emotions, and what drives my behavior.

options.label: Developing Specific Skills
options.description: Applying proven mental frameworks to practice and competition.

options.label: Show Me Everything
options.description: Give me the full picture across both stages.

questions.question: How soon do you need this?
questions.subtext: Helps us tailor the guide to your situation.

options.label: Very Soon
options.description: I have a big competition, season, or event coming up.

options.label: Over the Next Few Months
options.description: I'm working on this consistently as part of my development.

options.label: Just Exploring
options.description: I'm curious about what's available and where to start.
